text.title: Weekly Growth Review Rhythm Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Weekly Growth Review Rhythm.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS at $5K MRR with 4 active growth tests (SEO, cold email, lifecycle, partnerships). Founder schedules Monday 09:00 review; picks MRR / signups / trial→paid / CAC / churn; hypothesis log lists 4 tests; review forces continue+double-down on lifecycle and kill on cold-email.
